variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list appears to miss the main interest expense row. 'Interest-bearing liabilities' is on the Income Statement and behaves like the primary interest expense line (negative recurring amounts under net financial items), but the label is unusual and could be misclassified. Chose this outside the candidate list per instructions; manual review recommended. I did not add 'Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental' to avoid possible double counting with the broader line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest-bearing liabilities
